name: Gargos
description:
Gargos is a diabolical half-god who, alongside Eyedol, has been one of the primary antagonists of the Killer Instinct franchise ever since he appeared as the final boss of the 1996 arcade game Killer Instinct 2. Although Gargos hasn't appeared in every KI title, his name or influence are always mentioned and he has strong ties to Jago.

Gargos made his return to the KI series after twenty years as a playable character in the Season Three of Killer Instinct (2013), and features once again as the game's end boss in its Shadow Lords mode. In each of his iterations, he is shown to be the eternal rival of the demon warlord Eyedol.
creator: Nezu mas
